title: Grade 1 Math
description: Grade 1 math curriculum aligned to the Texas Essential Knowledge and Skills (TEKS). Topics include counting and place value to 120, addition and subtraction within 20, basic geometry, and simple money skills.

lessons.objective: Decompose two-digit numbers into tens and ones.
